heading: Army articles furnished to National Museum
label: 60 Army articles furnished to National Museum
text: The Secretary of the Army is authorized to furnish to the National Museum, for exhibition, upon request therefor by the administrative head thereof, such articles of arms, materiel, equipment, or clothing as have been issued from time to time to the United States Army, or which have been or may hereafter be produced for the United States Army, and which are objects of general interest or of foreign or curious research, provided that such articles can be spared.
notes: Amendments1951—Act , struck out “are surplus or” after “articles”.Oct. 31, 1951

Secretary of Air ForceFor transfer of certain personal property and personal property functions, insofar as they pertain to the Air Force, from Secretary of the Army to Secretary of the Air Force, see Secretary of Defense Transfer Order No. 39 [§ 2vv], eff. .May 18, 1949
